string.text: Weapons Handbook of the Warsaw Pact, Volume 1

Classified documents stolen from a Russian research center and temporarily relocated to the Zone. Contains specifications for current and experimental Russian rounds, along with empirical testing data on round performance. Volume 1 covers only standard and special rounds for military and police operations, including crowd control. Due to information security concerns, armor-piercing ammunition schematics have been moved to a higher-security document.

Classified documents stolen from a Russian research center and temporarily relocated to the Zone. Contains specifications for current and experimental Russian rounds, along with empirical testing data on round performance. Volume 1 covers only standard and special rounds for military and police operations, including crowd control. Due to information security concerns, armor-piercing ammunition schematics have been moved to a higher-security document.
Weapons Handbook of the Warsaw Pact, Volume 2

Classified documents stolen from a Russian research center and temporarily relocated to the Zone. Contains specifications for experimental Russian armor-piercing rounds of various calibers and empirical testing data on their performance. This volume focuses on armor-piercing rounds, including material analysis of penetrator cores and detailed mechanisms to maximize damage after penetrating armor. Pages concerning armor-piercing rounds have been mysteriously torn out.

Classified documents stolen from a Russian research center and temporarily relocated to the Zone. Contains specifications for experimental Russian armor-piercing rounds of various calibers and empirical testing data on their performance. This volume focuses on armor-piercing rounds, including material analysis of penetrator cores and detailed mechanisms to maximize damage after penetrating armor. Pages concerning armor-piercing rounds have been mysteriously torn out.
Pistol Ammunition Handbook

An American-produced book detailing various intricate aspects of employing pistols for personal protection. It covers common pistols and their ammunition types, from low-caliber .32 ACP rounds to increasingly impractical magnum loads. The book is interspersed with dubious "first-hand accounts," likely written by individuals who have never had to draw a gun on targets that shoot back or bite.

An American-produced book detailing various intricate aspects of employing pistols for personal protection. It covers common pistols and their ammunition types, from low-caliber .32 ACP rounds to increasingly impractical magnum loads. The book is interspersed with dubious "first-hand accounts," likely written by individuals who have never had to draw a gun on targets that shoot back or bite.
Shotgun Handbook

A detailed book covering the sport of shooting and hunting large game. It outlines various types of ammunition and their purposes, along with detailed performance charts and terminal ballistics in different conditions. Anatomical details of several large game animals are also included, with notes on effective kill shots—unfortunately, none of these normal creatures are present in the Zone.

A detailed book covering the sport of shooting and hunting large game. It outlines various types of ammunition and their purposes, along with detailed performance charts and terminal ballistics in different conditions. Anatomical details of several large game animals are also included, with notes on effective kill shots—unfortunately, none of these normal creatures are present in the Zone.
NATO Ammunition Handbook, Volume 1

A comprehensive technical document covering all specifications and dimensions of modern small arms ammunition within the NATO standards set. For completeness, various esoteric calibers are included, along with brief notes on their history and commentary from quartermasters and special forces operators.

A comprehensive technical document covering all specifications and dimensions of modern small arms ammunition within the NATO standards set. For completeness, various esoteric calibers are included, along with brief notes on their history and commentary from quartermasters and special forces operators.
NATO Ammunition Handbook, Volume 2

A comprehensive technical document covering all specifications and dimensions of modern small arms ammunition within the NATO standards set. For completeness, various esoteric calibers are included, along with brief notes on their history and commentary from quartermasters and special forces operators.

A comprehensive technical document covering all specifications and dimensions of modern small arms ammunition within the NATO standards set. For completeness, various esoteric calibers are included, along with brief notes on their history and commentary from quartermasters and special forces operators.
Artifact Applications for Weapons

A research paper produced by the Ministry of Science using various stalker groups. It outlines more than twenty different types of experiments, most of which ended in failures of varying catastrophic levels.

A research paper produced by the Ministry of Science using various stalker groups. It outlines more than twenty different types of experiments, most of which ended in failures of varying catastrophic levels.
The Sin Ritual Book

A mysterious book seemingly constructed from several handwritten sheets of paper, with no authors or identifying marks. The information inside is surprisingly thorough and useful, almost like reading a wilderness survival guide. Substantial data is present on many of the "gifts" of the Zone—divided among mutant anatomy, anomaly structure, and artifact properties. Scattered among the information are various practical applications for the Zone's rewards: for example, which parts of meat can be extracted for blood restoration serum, or how anomaly fruit punch can be used to carefully remove stains from clothing.

A mysterious book seemingly constructed from several handwritten sheets of paper, with no authors or identifying marks. The information inside is surprisingly thorough and useful, almost like reading a wilderness survival guide. Substantial data is present on many of the "gifts" of the Zone—divided among mutant anatomy, anomaly structure, and artifact properties. Scattered among the information are various practical applications for the Zone's rewards: for example, which parts of meat can be extracted for blood restoration serum, or how anomaly fruit punch can be used to carefully remove stains from clothing.
Pyromaniac's Cookbook

An open notebook covered in fine traces of ash. The information within exclusively pertains to burner anomalies—burners, fire artifacts, incendiary ammunition, and grenades. Compiled from various sources, some printed and others handwritten.

An open notebook covered in fine traces of ash. The information within exclusively pertains to burner anomalies—burners, fire artifacts, incendiary ammunition, and grenades. Compiled from various sources, some printed and others handwritten.
Experimental Artifact Trials #22, "Prometheus"

Scientific notebooks detailing experiments with artifacts. Notably, several trials involve using small fragments of broken artifacts to alter the properties of combustible materials. The experiment logs outline techniques that allow for reliable and repeatable fine-tuning of smokeless powder combustion using otherwise worthless fragments of thermal artifacts, as well as chaotic and unstable reactions with liquid fuels.

Scientific notebooks detailing experiments with artifacts. Notably, several trials involve using small fragments of broken artifacts to alter the properties of combustible materials. The experiment logs outline techniques that allow for reliable and repeatable fine-tuning of smokeless powder combustion using otherwise worthless fragments of thermal artifacts, as well as chaotic and unstable reactions with liquid fuels.
Experimental Artifact Trials #67

Scientific notebooks detailing experiments with artifacts. A very extensive document focused on attempting to transmute metals into gold and silver. While most of these experiments ended in various forms of failure, there is documented success in transferring properties to significantly harder metals like tungsten.

Scientific notebooks detailing experiments with artifacts. A very extensive document focused on attempting to transmute metals into gold and silver. While most of these experiments ended in various forms of failure, there is documented success in transferring properties to significantly harder metals like tungsten.
